OpenCLI Renderer

jf

v0.1.0 OpenCLI 0.1-draft

Manage your Jellyfin server from the command line. Available command areas include authentication, items, library management, server administration, users, playlists, and more.

Overview

Reference context

Reference scope

Top-level command groups
20
Documented commands
193
Leaf commands
153
jf›artists

artists

Browse music artists or album artists

Subcommands

list→

List artists or album artists
jf›artists›list

list

List artists or album artists

Options

--album-artists
flag Declared

List album artists instead of track artists

--all
flag Declared

Auto-page until all results are fetched

--api-key
<KEY> Declared KEY · 1 System.String

API key

--config
<PATH> Declared PATH · 1 System.String

Path to config file (overrides default location)

--json
flag Declared

Emit JSON instead of table output

--limit
<N> Declared N · 1 System.Nullable<System.Int32>

Limit result count

--parent
<ID> Declared ID · 1 System.String

Restrict results to one parent item or folder

--profile
<NAME> Declared NAME · 1 System.String

Profile name on the resolved host

--search
<TERM> Declared TERM · 1 System.String

Filter artists by name

--server
<URL> Declared URL · 1 System.String

Jellyfin server URL or hostname

--start
<N> Declared N · 1 System.Nullable<System.Int32>

Start index for paged queries

--token
<TOKEN> Declared TOKEN · 1 System.String

Access token

--user
<ID> Declared ID · 1 System.String

User context for user-scoped commands (id or 'me')

--verbose
flag Declared

Show request details

--yes
flag Declared

Skip confirmation prompts

jf›auth

auth

Sign in, inspect identity, and manage API keys

Subcommands

host→

Manage configured hosts
keys→

Manage API keys [[admin]]
login→

Sign in with username and password
logout→

Remove stored credentials and end the current session
profiles→

Manage saved server profiles
quick→

Quick Connect flows
users→

List public users shown on the login screen
whoami→

Show the authenticated user and current server
jf›auth›host

host

Manage configured hosts

Subcommands

alias→

Manage host aliases
delete→

Remove a host and all its profiles
list→

List all configured hosts
rename→

Rename a host key
use→

Set the default host
jf›auth›host›alias

alias

Manage host aliases

Subcommands

add→

Add an alias to a host
list→

List aliases
remove→

Remove an alias from a host
jf›auth›host›alias›add

add

Add an alias to a host

NameRequiredArityAccepted valuesGroupDescription
HOSTNAMEYes1——Host to add the alias to
ALIASYes1——Short alias for the host

jf›items

items

Browse, search, refresh, and update library items

Subcommands

ancestors→

Show parent hierarchy for an item
counts→

Show library item counts
dates→

Show date fields used for latest-items diagnostics
delete→

Delete an item from the library and filesystem
download→

Download original media or file
explain-latest→

Explain why an item is or is not visible in latest
favorite→

Mark or unmark favorites
get→

Show one item by id
images→

Manage item artwork
latest→

Inspect Jellyfin's latest-items shelf
list→

Query items with filters
lyrics→

Read, search, download, upload, or delete lyrics
nfo→

Inspect local NFO sidecar metadata
playback-info→

Inspect playback media sources and streams
refresh→

Refresh metadata, images, or trickplay
remote-images→

Browse or download remote item artwork
remote-search→

Search external metadata providers (TMDb, AniDB, IMDB, ...)
resume→

Show continue-watching items
search→

Search names and titles
similar→

Find similar items
subtitles→

Search, download, upload, or delete subtitles
suggestions→

Show suggested items for the current user
themes→

List theme songs and videos for an item
tree→

Show a recursive item tree for diagnostics
update→

Update item metadata

flag Declared

<KEY> Declared KEY · 1 System.String

flag Declared

Sort descending instead of ascending

--json
flag Declared

Emit JSON instead of table output

--limit
<N> Declared N · 1 System.Nullable<System.Int32>

Limit result count

--media-type
<TYPE> Declared TYPE · 1 System.String

--parent
<ID> Declared ID · 1 System.String

Profile name on the resolved host

--recursive
flag Declared

Search recursively within the parent folder

--search
<TERM> Declared TERM · 1 System.String

Filter by search term

--server
<URL> Declared URL · 1 System.String

Jellyfin server URL or hostname

--sort

<N> Declared N · 1 System.Nullable<System.Int32>

Start index for paged queries

--token

library

restart→

sessions

Inspect sessions and remote-control clients

Subcommands

command→

Send a general command payload
list→

List active sessions
message→

Display a message on a client
play→

Start playback on a session
state→

Send pause/resume/stop/seek commands

command

Send a general command payload

Arguments

NameRequiredArityAccepted valuesGroupDescription
SESSION_IDYes1——Target session id
COMMANDYes1——General command name (e.g. MoveUp, GoHome, ToggleMute, SetVolume, DisplayMessage)

triggers

NameRequiredArityAccepted valuesGroupDescription

TASK_IDNo1——Task ID when using the 'set' action

flag Declared

<KEY> Declared KEY · 1 System.String

flag Declared

Replace all triggers with an empty list

<TIME> Declared TIME · 1 System.String[]

Add a daily trigger, repeatable

<JSON> Declared JSON · 1 System.String

Inline JSON trigger list

flag Declared

Emit JSON instead of table output

--limit
<N> Declared N · 1 System.Nullable<System.Int32>

Limit result count

--max-runtime
<TIMESPAN> Declared TIMESPAN · 1 System.String

Apply one max runtime to all flag-built triggers

<NAME> Declared NAME · 1 System.String

Profile name on the resolved host

--server
<URL> Declared URL · 1 System.String

Jellyfin server URL or hostname

--start
<N> Declared N · 1 System.Nullable<System.Int32>

flag Declared
